title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Pugmarks India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Pugmarks India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Pugmarks India are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pugmarks India:
Pugmarks India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
